## Meeting Purpose

[Clarify 409A valuation requirements and asset transfer valuation for FWD Digital's funding and QSBS qualification.](https://fathom.video/share/LVzJNfsxeLAo4swmwiYGNzxwZdBZCBgx?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Two separate valuations needed: 1) 409A valuation as of Feb 27, 2025, for QSBS and options; 2) Asset transfer valuation as of Jan 23, 2025](https://fathom.video/share/LVzJNfsxeLAo4swmwiYGNzxwZdBZCBgx?tab=summary&timestamp=8.0)
  - [409A valuation must be under $50M for QSBS qualification; aiming for lowest possible value for Daniel's options](https://fathom.video/share/LVzJNfsxeLAo4swmwiYGNzxwZdBZCBgx?tab=summary&timestamp=60.0)
  - [Nainesh to provide both valuation numbers by 5 PM ET on Feb 27, enabling deal closure on Feb 28](https://fathom.video/share/LVzJNfsxeLAo4swmwiYGNzxwZdBZCBgx?tab=summary&timestamp=99.0)

## Topics

### 409A Valuation Requirements

  - [Valuation date: February 27, 2025 (tomorrow)](https://fathom.video/share/LVzJNfsxeLAo4swmwiYGNzxwZdBZCBgx?tab=summary&timestamp=125.0)
  - [Must be under $50M for QSBS qualification](https://fathom.video/share/LVzJNfsxeLAo4swmwiYGNzxwZdBZCBgx?tab=summary&timestamp=60.0)
  - [Will be used for both QSBS reporting to Moderna and Daniel's stock options](https://fathom.video/share/LVzJNfsxeLAo4swmwiYGNzxwZdBZCBgx?tab=summary&timestamp=72.0)
  - [Aiming for lowest possible value, especially for Daniel's options](https://fathom.video/share/LVzJNfsxeLAo4swmwiYGNzxwZdBZCBgx?tab=summary&timestamp=72.0)
  - [Nainesh to provide a preliminary number in writing (e.g., one-pager) by 5 PM ET on Feb 27](https://fathom.video/share/LVzJNfsxeLAo4swmwiYGNzxwZdBZCBgx?tab=summary&timestamp=278.0)

### Asset Transfer Valuation

  - [Separate from 409A valuation](https://fathom.video/share/LVzJNfsxeLAo4swmwiYGNzxwZdBZCBgx?tab=summary&timestamp=218.0)
  - [Valuation date: January 23, 2025](https://fathom.video/share/LVzJNfsxeLAo4swmwiYGNzxwZdBZCBgx?tab=summary&timestamp=715.0)
  - [Covers IP and code base transferred from LLC to FWD Digital](https://fathom.video/share/LVzJNfsxeLAo4swmwiYGNzxwZdBZCBgx?tab=summary&timestamp=624.0)
  - [Critical for Marcel's shares and QSBS qualification](https://fathom.video/share/LVzJNfsxeLAo4swmwiYGNzxwZdBZCBgx?tab=summary&timestamp=204.0)
  - [Nainesh needs detailed list of transferred assets (IP, code base)](https://fathom.video/share/LVzJNfsxeLAo4swmwiYGNzxwZdBZCBgx?tab=summary&timestamp=225.0)

### QSBS Qualification

  - [FWD Digital needs a formal QSBS qualification letter](https://fathom.video/share/LVzJNfsxeLAo4swmwiYGNzxwZdBZCBgx?tab=summary&timestamp=579.0)
  - [Carter & Co. engaged but process incomplete due to missing asset transfer valuation](https://fathom.video/share/LVzJNfsxeLAo4swmwiYGNzxwZdBZCBgx?tab=summary&timestamp=553.0)
  - [Nainesh recommends ensuring a proper QSBS letter is obtained](https://fathom.video/share/LVzJNfsxeLAo4swmwiYGNzxwZdBZCBgx?tab=summary&timestamp=579.0)

### Engagement and Billing

  - [Marcel to sign updated engagement letter for 409A valuation](https://fathom.video/share/LVzJNfsxeLAo4swmwiYGNzxwZdBZCBgx?tab=summary&timestamp=376.0)
  - [Nainesh to send separate engagement letter for asset transfer valuation](https://fathom.video/share/LVzJNfsxeLAo4swmwiYGNzxwZdBZCBgx?tab=summary&timestamp=696.0)
  - [Invoice to be sent promptly; payment required to formally engage Nainesh's services](https://fathom.video/share/LVzJNfsxeLAo4swmwiYGNzxwZdBZCBgx?tab=summary&timestamp=330.0)
  - [Total cost expected to increase by a couple thousand dollars due to additional valuation](https://fathom.video/share/LVzJNfsxeLAo4swmwiYGNzxwZdBZCBgx?tab=summary&timestamp=263.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Marcel to sign and return 409A valuation engagement letter](https://fathom.video/share/LVzJNfsxeLAo4swmwiYGNzxwZdBZCBgx?tab=summary&timestamp=373.0)
  - [Bridget to provide FWD Digital's official mailing address to Nainesh](https://fathom.video/share/LVzJNfsxeLAo4swmwiYGNzxwZdBZCBgx?tab=summary&timestamp=345.0)
  - [Bridget to send detailed list of transferred assets (IP, code base) as of Jan 23, 2025](https://fathom.video/share/LVzJNfsxeLAo4swmwiYGNzxwZdBZCBgx?tab=summary&timestamp=611.0)
  - [Nainesh to provide both valuation numbers by 5 PM ET on Feb 27](https://fathom.video/share/LVzJNfsxeLAo4swmwiYGNzxwZdBZCBgx?tab=summary&timestamp=689.0)
  - [FWD Digital to pay invoice upon receipt to formally engage Nainesh's services](https://fathom.video/share/LVzJNfsxeLAo4swmwiYGNzxwZdBZCBgx?tab=summary&timestamp=330.0)
  - [FWD Digital to proceed with deal closure on Feb 28, after receiving valuation numbers](https://fathom.video/share/LVzJNfsxeLAo4swmwiYGNzxwZdBZCBgx?tab=summary&timestamp=756.0)
  - [FWD Digital to complete QSBS qualification process with Carter & Co. using new valuations](https://fathom.video/share/LVzJNfsxeLAo4swmwiYGNzxwZdBZCBgx?tab=summary&timestamp=579.0)
